code:
import io
import string

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut longest = ""
mut longest_len = 0
mut current = ""
mut current_len = 0
mut i = 0

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
  if is_ws
    if current_len > longest_len
      longest = current
      longest_len = current_len
    end
    current = ""
    current_len = 0
  else
    current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
    current_len = current_len + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if current_len > longest_len
  longest = current
  longest_len = current_len
end

println("longest=#{longest}")
